homepage.title: ROEMHELD | Clamping and Handling Technology  - Römheld
homepage.description: Elements and systems for clamping workpieces. Clamping technology for moulds on presses, punches and injection moulding machines. Equipment for handling workpieces.

For YOUR EFFICIENCY
Workholding and more
ROEMHELD is one of the worldwide market leaders in stationary workholding, quick die change, assembly and handling.
Excellently networked
International Presence
Contact persons
found
Years
EXPERIENCE
EXPERIENCE
Emerged from an iron foundry, we have been producing products for workholding since end of the 1940s. Significant developments in the industrial sector were launched on the market by us then and now. We are proud of our more than 100 patents.
Locations
WORLDWIDE
COUNTRIES
With subsidiaries in Great Britain, France, China, the USA, Japan and South Korea and qualified sales partners all over the world, we offer competent on-site advice and comprehensive service everywhere.
More than
PRODUCTS
25000
CATALOGUE PRODUCTS
We offer the most economical solutions with the best price-performance ratio based on our catalogue prod-ucts and countless customised products delivered. Besides components, we also supply complex turnkey systems, including engineering and commissioning.
Contact us
STAY UP TO DATE
What matters to us
Application Workholding
Clamping Technology for AGVs in Practice
How batteries are securely fixed on AGVs – read the application report now.
read more
Product News Workholding
H 4.400 Concentric Vise – Power Clamp Centric
These concentric vises can position and clamp workpieces with an accuracy of ±0.005 mm.
read more
Product News Workholding
B1.8807 Swing clamps without swing stroke
In this version without axial swing stroke, the clamping arm swivels in one plane and does not make any axial movement
read more
Product News Workholding
Online flip catalogues
Power Workholding | Hydraulic Cylinders | Hydraulic Components | Power Units and Clamping Pumps
read more
Product News Workholding
New small electric swing clamp
There is now a new small version of the tried-and-tested B1.8310 electric swing clamp.
read more
Product News Quick Die Change
RWS new rail-guided tool changing table
Simple, Safe, and Fast Transport of Loads Up to 40 Tonnes
read more
Product News Assembly & Handling
New ROEMHELD bearing press
Hydraulic pull-in device for mounting bearings, plain bearings or bushes by pulling them into the bearing seat.
read more
Product News Workholding
Compact Clamps with Universal Lever
Compact clamps B1.827/B1.828 are now also available with universal levers for adapting customer-specific clamping levers
read more
Product News Workholding
NEW: Electric swing clamps B1.8320
Parallel drive, position and clamping force monitoring, IO-Link connection optional
read more
